description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is a light metallic color, suggesting steel or a similar metal. The guard is ornate, flaring outward with blue, wing-like extensions and a gold accent at the base of the blade. The handle is wrapped in a brown, textured material for grip, and ends in a blue pommel adorned with a prominent, round, purple gem. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with fantasy-inspired elements. The sword appears well-crafted and balanced, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application.
description: A stylized sword with a straight, double-edged blade, ornate blue and gold guard, brown wrapped handle, and a gem-set pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade, ornate blue guard, brown handle, and prominent purple gem in the pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the guard and pommel appearing narrow.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, guard, handle, and gem pommel from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_handle_design: brown wrapped, contoured, with a blue pommel and purple gem
attribute_ornamentation: blue and gold guard, purple gem in pommel
